source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two air flows are combined to a single flow. One flow is 1 m^3/s at 20\circ\text{C} and the other is 2 m^3/s at 200\circ\text{C}, both at 100 kPa. They mix without any heat transfer to produce an exit flow at 100 kPa. Neglect kinetic energies and find the exit volume flow rate.

They mix without any heat transfer to produce an exit flow at 100 kPa. Neglect kinetic energies and find the exit volume flow rate.
